results.title: Legion Baseball: CBW Powers Past Crofton 10-2
results.description: CREIGHTON, Neb. — Creighton-Bloomfield-Wausa used a seven-run first inning to surge past Crofton 10-2 in American Legion baseball action on Wednesday.

results.title: Baseball: 79ers Win Region 4B Title
results.description: TYNDALL — The Scotland-Menno-Freeman-Canistota 79ers punched their ticket to state with a 4-3 victory over Tyndall in the Region 4B 14-Under Baseball Tournament, Wednesday in Tyndall.

results.title: Korea Board Games to Operate Experience Zone for 10 New Titles at Board Game Con
results.description: Source: Korea Board GamesKorea Board Games will host a booth at the 2026 Board Game Con, held at COEX Hall B1 from July 16 to 19, offering hands-on experiences with new and popular......

results.title: Some Scream, Others Cry, Many Sprint Shirtless: How Argentina Fans Celebrate World Cup Semi-Final Victory
results.description: Fans at Obelisk in Buenos Aires celebrate Argentina's victory over England in FIFA World Cup semi-final.

results.title: India was forced to play Vaibhav Sooryavanshi in England due to indirect pressure, Gambhir had no say
results.description: Gambhir & Agarkar had decided that Sanju Samson would play 6 matches, and Vaibhav Sooryavanshi would only get one match. The post India was forced to play Vaibhav Sooryavanshi in England due to indirect pressure, Gambhir had no say appeared first on Inside Sport India .

results.title: Tuchel Vows to Stay After England’s Argentina Heartbreak
results.description: Thomas Tuchel says he will stay on to lead England into Euro 2028. This comes after a brutal World Cup semi-final defeat to Argentina. The Three Lions lost 1-2 in a match that felt like history was being made.
